question_0.question:
Attribute 1 care_site-location_id and its description 1 the care_site table contains a list of uniquely identified institutional (physical or organizational) units where healthcare delivery is practiced (offices, wards, hospitals, clinics, etc.).;a foreign key to the geographic location in the location table, where the detailed address information is stored. 
Attribute 2 d_icd_diagnoses-icd9_code and its description 2 d_icd_diagnoses defines international classification of diseases version 9 (icd-9) codes for diagnoses.;icd9 code - note that this is a fixed length character field, as whitespaces are important in uniquely identifying icd-9 codes. 
Do attribute 1 and attribute 2 are semantically matched with each other?

question_1.question:
Attribute 1 care_site-location_id and its description 1 the care_site table contains a list of uniquely identified institutional (physical or organizational) units where healthcare delivery is practiced (offices, wards, hospitals, clinics, etc.).;a foreign key to the geographic location in the location table, where the detailed address information is stored. 
Attribute 2 d_icd_diagnoses-short_title and its description 2 d_icd_diagnoses defines international classification of diseases version 9 (icd-9) codes for diagnoses.;short_title provides a brief definition for the given diagnosis code in icd9_code. 
Do attribute 1 and attribute 2 are semantically matched with each other?
